instruction: Write an HTML5 article page with nested sections for Overview, Requirements, and Rollout plan. Maintain a logical heading hierarchy from h1 through h3.
code:
Self-service billing exports

Proposal for finance and operations teams.

Overview

Customers can download CSV invoices without contacting support.

Requirements

Access control

Only billing admins may export historical invoices.

Audit trail

Each export event is logged with user and timestamp.

Rollout plan

Pilot with ten enterprise accounts before general availability.
